_comment_disclaimer: EXAMPLE ONLY. The exact glob/pattern syntax for Bash permissions in Claude Code may evolve and depends on your Claude Code version. Verify against the current Claude Code docs before relying on these patterns. The shape (permissions.allow / permissions.deny / env) is correct; the contents are illustrative.
_comment: Copy this file to .claude/settings.json in your project root and edit to match your stack. Remove the _comment_* fields once you're done.

permissions._comment: Scope the agent's shell access. Defaults below allow common dev commands and block direct main-branch operations.

env._comment: Per-project env overrides for the Claude Code session. Do NOT put secrets here; put them in .env and load via your app.
